title: 英国推出 6.75 亿美元主权人工智能基金
content: 为了尽量减少对其他国家技术的依赖，英国政府正在向本土人工智能初创企业投入资源。
original_title: The UK Launches Its $675 Million Sovereign AI Fund
original_content: In a bid to minimize dependence on technology from other countries, the UK government is plowing resources into homegrown AI startups.

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。

title: 人工智能芯片初创公司 Cerebras 申请 IPO
content: 近几个月来，该公司宣布与 Amazon Web Services 达成协议，在 Amazon 数据中心使用 Cerebras 芯片，并与 OpenAI 达成一项据报道价值超过 100 亿美元的协议。
original_title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
original_content: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.
